title: crotalaria scandens
intro: Crotalaria scandens, also known as climbing rattlebox, is a perennial climber belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria scandens include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria scandens include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are typically taken orally or applied topically to the affected area.
